story.iWant: to configure script generation parameters before generating
story.soThat: I can control the tone and style of the meditation script

task.name: Create ScriptConfigModal component
task.subtask: Create src/components/ScriptConfigModal.tsx
Implement modal layout with Dialog from shadcn/ui
Add tone input with datalist suggestions for 4 options
Add target duration number input with min/max constraints
Add additional instructions textarea with character counter
Add aria-labels and accessibility attributes

task.name: Create ScriptConfigForm with validation
task.subtask: Create Zod schema in src/containers/Main/LessonScriptGeneration/constants.ts
Integrate React Hook Form with zodResolver
Implement inline validation error display
Add character counter for instructions field (max 500)

task.name: Integrate modal with GenerateScriptButton
task.subtask: Modify src/components/GenerateScriptButton.tsx to open modal on click
Add modal open/close state management
Pass lesson data (duration, key_themes) to modal
Handle modal close via Cancel button and Escape key

task.name: Update mutation to include configuration
task.subtask: Update src/containers/Main/LessonScriptGeneration/connect.ts mutation
Add configuration body to POST request: { tone, target_duration, instructions }
Update types to include ScriptGenerationConfig interface

task.name: Implement Shift+Click bypass
task.subtask: Add event handler to detect Shift key on button click
If Shift held, skip modal and call mutation with defaults
Show appropriate toast message for default generation

task.name: Use lesson's tone as default
task.subtask: Pre-fill tone field with lesson.tone value
No localStorage needed - lesson data is authoritative

task.name: Testing and validation
task.subtask: Run bun typecheck - verify no type errors
Run bun lint:fix - verify no lint errors
Manual test: modal opens on button click
Manual test: form submits with valid data
Manual test: form shows validation errors for invalid duration
Manual test: Escape key closes modal
Manual test: Shift+click bypasses modal
Manual test: tone field pre-filled with lesson's tone

criterion.given: I click "Generate Script" on a lesson
criterion.then: - A configuration modal appears - The modal contains tone selection, duration adjustment, and additional instructions fields - The modal title indicates this is for script configuration

- Tone: Text input with suggestions: Calming, Energizing, Neutral, Guided Visualization (pre-filled with lesson's current tone) - Target duration: Number input pre-filled from lesson duration, adjustable ±5 min (min 1, max 120) - Additional instructions: Optional textarea for specific guidance (max 500 characters)

criterion.given: I select a tone and click "Generate" in the modal
criterion.then: - The generation starts with my selected configuration - The modal closes automatically - The lesson status updates to SCRIPT_GENERATING - A toast notification appears: "Script generation started..."

criterion.given: I click "Cancel" or press Escape in the modal
criterion.then: - The modal closes without starting generation - No API call is made - The lesson status remains unchanged
- Generation starts immediately with current lesson data - No modal appears - Toast notification: "Script generation started..."

criterion.given: the form has invalid data (duration < 1 or > 120)
criterion.then: - Inline validation errors appear below the invalid field - The form does not submit - The modal remains open

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Strict separation between business logic (connect.ts) and presentation (index.tsx). All API interactions use openapi-react-query with auto-generated types.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.section: Form Management: React Hook Form + Zod
doc.snippet: Declarative forms with schema validation. Zod for type-safe schemas, runtime validation + TypeScript types. zodResolver integration with React Hook Form.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: All API interactions use auto-generated, type-safe hooks from the backend OpenAPI specification. Use $api.useMutation for POST requests with body configuration.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Size: Medium (600px max-width). Backdrop blur (8px) for depth. Focus trap within modal. Close on Escape key. Auto-focus first input on open.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Labels above inputs (stacked). Help text below textarea showing character count. Error messages in red below invalid fields. Validation on blur and submit.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Primary: Solid cyan (#7dcfff) background. Secondary: Transparent, cyan border. Destructive: Red/pink (#f7768e). All interactive elements minimum 44px touch targets.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: WCAG 2.1 Level AA. aria-label on all icon-only buttons. aria-describedby connecting form inputs to error text. Focus indicators visible (cyan ring).

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: Configure tone (Calming, Energizing, Neutral, Guided Visualization), target duration, and additional instructions. Shift+Click bypass. localStorage persistence.

doc.title: Product Requirements
doc.snippet: One-click script generation with progress tracking. Preview generated scripts. Edit capabilities post-generation. Version history.

doc.title: Story 4.1 (Completed)
doc.snippet: GenerateScriptButton created at src/components/GenerateScriptButton.tsx. LessonScriptGeneration container at src/containers/Main/LessonScriptGeneration/. Mutation uses $api.useMutation('post', '/api/courses/{slug}/lessons/{id}/generate-script').

file.reason: Primary component to modify - needs to open configuration modal on click and support Shift+Click bypass
Mutation hook to extend - needs to accept configuration parameters (tone, target_duration, instructions) in request body
Add TONE_OPTIONS and scriptConfigSchema Zod validation schema here
Integration point - uses GenerateScriptButton, need to pass lesson data (duration, key_themes) to modal
shadcn/ui Dialog component - use for ScriptConfigModal base
shadcn/ui Select component - use for tone dropdown
Lesson type definition with durationMinutes, status, and other fields
OpenAPI client - all mutations use this

npm.package: Zod resolver for React Hook Form

interface.name: POST /api/courses/{slug}/lessons/{id}/generate-script
interface.path: Backend API - verify support for body parameters

interface.name: Lesson
ScriptConfigFormData

constraints.constraint: Container Pattern: All business logic in connect.ts, presentation in index.tsx or component files. Never mix API calls in presentational components.
OpenAPI-First: Use $api.useMutation with auto-generated types. Never write manual fetch calls.
Form validation with Zod schemas defined in constants.ts. Use zodResolver with React Hook Form.
Use Tailwind CSS utility classes. Follow UX spec color palette: primary #7dcfff, background #1a1d29, surface #24283b.
WCAG 2.1 AA compliance. aria-labels on icon buttons, aria-describedby for form errors, visible focus indicators.
Client state in Zustand (auth only). Server state in React Query. localStorage for user preferences only.
Run bun typecheck and bun lint:fix before commit. Manual testing for all acceptance criteria.
Import types consistently: import type { X } from 'y'. Use @/ path alias for all imports.
Medium size modal (600px max-width). Backdrop blur. Focus trap. Close on Escape. Auto-focus first input.
Use toast from sonner. toast.info for start, toast.success for completion, toast.error for failures.

tests.standards: Type checking with bun typecheck (tsc --noEmit). Linting with ESLint (bun lint:fix). Manual testing for all acceptance criteria. Unit tests with Vitest for complex logic. Pre-commit hooks run lint-staged (eslint --fix, prettier --write, bun typecheck).

ideas.idea: Verify modal opens when GenerateScriptButton is clicked
Verify form contains all required fields with correct defaults
Verify mutation is called with configuration and modal closes on success
Verify Cancel button and Escape key close modal without API call
Verify Shift+Click bypasses modal and uses current lesson data
Verify Zod validation rejects duration < 1 or > 120
Test ScriptConfigModal renders correct form fields with proper labels
Test validation displays inline errors for invalid duration values
Test character counter updates on textarea input
Test tone field is pre-filled with lesson's tone value
